p.strong: Word list expanded ONCE at loop start, then iterated

div.p: Expansion happens ONCE at loop start bash files="*.txt" for f in $files; do # $files was expanded to ["a.txt", "b.txt"] # Creating new .txt files here does NOT # add them to the iteration! touch new.txt done
div.h1: Loop iterates only over original expansion
div.p: Modifying the loop variable inside the body does NOT affect which values are iterated: bash for i in 1 2 3; do i=100 # Changes $i echo $i # Prints: 100, 100, 100 done
Processing a.txt Processing b.txt Processing c.txt Processing /project/data
